subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-11-21 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: The Hosts of the Kingdom of Abha are at all times gaining fresh victories... When I dictate a supplication my whole being is absorbed in the mercy and tenderness of God.
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @growth of the Cause, @power of prayer, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
